name: @tool-compiler/sdk-node
description: TypeScript builder SDK for tool-compiler plans, intents, and recipes.

scripts.build: npm run generate && tsc -p tsconfig.build.json && tsc -p tsconfig.cjs.json && node scripts/write-cjs-package.mjs
scripts.test: npm run generate && tsc -p tsconfig.test.json && node --test dist-test/index.test.js
